market_summary.notes: Global markets are experiencing heightened volatility driven by Middle East geopolitical tensions. Brent crude has spiked above $110/bbl due to concerns over infrastructure stability. Investors are adopting a flight-to-safety posture, though equity impact remains moderated.

art_highlights: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center (Opened Mar 20, 2026; through Jun 28, 2026) — landmark queer art exhibition.
Perrotin Seoul '10 Years' Anniversary Exhibition (Through May 2, 2026) — featuring new works by Takashi Murakami and Korean masters.
Kim Yun-shin Retrospective at Hoam Museum of Art (Through Jun 28, 2026) — major retrospective for the nonagenarian sculptor.
